title: Michigan DDS Pay-Scale Research Notes (Authoritative — MI Civil Service job spec + MDCS Section A)
description: Narrative research notes for Michigan DDS pay: administering agency (MDHHS Disability Determination Services), the verified Disability Examiner series (levels 9/10/P11/12 on pay schedule W22, SEIU 517M HSS) and Disability Exam Manager (levels 13/14/15, NERE) with levels from the official MI Civil Service job spec and hourly base min/max from the official MDCS Compensation Plan Section A (eff 10/1/2025), an annualization note (hourly * 2080), and SEIU Local 517M HSS bargaining context. Companion to MI/scheduled-rates.json.

source.publisher: Michigan Civil Service Commission / MDCS; MI Dept of Health and Human Services (MDHHS) Disability Determination Services
source.title: MI DDS salary research notes (MI Civil Service Disability Examiner job spec + MDCS Compensation Plan Section A eff 10/1/2025, retrieved 2026-06-02)

update_cadence: annual MDCS compensation plan (Oct 1) / SEIU 517M CBA cycle
notes: Authoritative: levels from the official MI Civil Service job spec (Disability Examiner 9/10/P11/12 on schedule W22; Disability Exam Manager 13/14/15) and hourly base min/max from the official MDCS Compensation Plan Section A eff 10/1/2025, cross-confirmed by the MCSC online job-spec pay-range page. Annual = hourly * 2080 (derived). Corrections: examiner class is 'Disability Examiner' on schedule W22 (prior P-11/P-12 grade guess conflated level codes with grades); SEIU 517M HSS = examiner unit, managers NERE/exempt. SEIU 517M HSS CBA step terms not separately verified.
